'''Javyar's Cantina''' was a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] located in the [[Lower City]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]. An atrium with a set of [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]] tables led into the main bar. A [[Zax's bounty office|bounty office]] owned by [[Zax]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] was located in one wing and a stage with dancers and music was in the wing opposite. It was a popular hangout and was frequented by such people as [[Lyn Sekla]], [[Uriah]], [[Holdan]], [[Gelrood]], [[Mission Vao]], [[Zaalbar]], [[Canderous Ordo]], and [[Calo Nord]].<ref name="KOTOR" />
